## Summary

One-line summary of the requested feature.

## Motivation

Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

What is the use case you're trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should the feature work? Describe your proposed implementation.

### Example Usage

```python
# How would users use this feature?
result = some_new_feature(param1, param2)
```

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches could solve this problem?

Why is your proposed solution better?

## Related Issues

- #123
- #456

## Additional Context

Any mockups, links, documentation, or examples?

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked if this feature already exists or has been requested
- [ ] I have provided clear motivation for the feature
- [ ] I have described the proposed solution
- [ ] I have considered alternatives
